name: Stress Test Advisor to improve approval rate
description: Stress Test Advisor to improve approval rate allocates ledger entries and settles customer profiles; applies decision gates and observability; orchestrates via Case Management to accelerate onboarding.

steps.name: Transfer Intake
steps.description: Collect, validate and normalize cases from Payment Hub; attach a runId and timestamp for traceability.

steps.name: Generate
steps.description: Execute generate phase for the Self-Verify pattern: persist interim state, enforce guardrails, and emit structured JSON results.

steps.name: Verify
steps.description: Execute verify phase for the Self-Verify pattern: persist interim state, enforce guardrails, and emit structured JSON results.

steps.name: Portfolio Check
steps.description: Portfolio Check across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Sanctions Screening
steps.description: Sanctions Screening across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Underwriting
steps.description: Underwriting across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Regulatory Report
steps.description: Assemble final payload with status, artifacts, KPIs and audit trail; store to Fraud Platform; return response JSON for the client.
